summary: createWorktreeIfNeeded(slug, mainCwd) is implemented at bin/lib/run.mjs:162-172. It returns the absolute path .team/worktrees/<slug>, reuses the directory if it already exists, and otherwise invokes `git worktree add <path> -B feature/<sanitized-slug>` via execFileSync. Sanitization is handled by slugToBranch (lowercase, spaces/underscores to dashes, strip non-[a-z0-9.-], cap at 72 chars). Tests in test/worktree.test.mjs cover slug normalization, path computation, reuse, mock execFileSync calls, and -B-vs-b semantics; full npm test passes (539 pass, 0 fail).
